Hosted by singer and TV personality Karla Díaz, is one of Mexico’s most beloved and visually iconic talk shows. Known for its all-pink set and candid, playful tone, the show features stars from music, film, comedy, and social media in intimate conversations full of laughs, gossip, and surprising confessions. Since its launch in 2020, Pinky Promise has become a pop culture staple in Latin America, with a combined digital reach of over 3.5 million followers and subscribers across platforms—including 2.2M+ YouTube subscribers, 1M+ Instagram followers, and a Top 10 podcast in Mexico with over 100K monthly listeners on Spotify and Apple.

Univisión’s signature daytime entertainment talk/reality show, hosted by Julián Gil and blending celebrity news commentary, audience voting, and panelist challenges. The format features rotating panelists including journalists, social media personalities, and special guests—competing weekly in opinion face-offs where the “loser” must complete humorous or revealing tasks. Since launching in 2022, the show has built a strong daily viewership of approximately 150,000+ U.S. Hispanic viewers (P2+), with audience demand 1.6× higher than the average TV series in the U.S. Hispanic market  . Its social presence and ViX integration extend its reach, making it a standout platform for engaging culturally relevant Hispanic audiences.

“Hoy” is Televisa’s flagship daytime entertainment news show—an influential cultural pillar across Mexico and the broader Latin American and Hispanic communities in the U.S. With a newsroom-style format combining celebrity interviews, lifestyle segments, music performances, game sections, and personalities that connect across generations, Hoy establishes itself as a leading platform for brand integrations and entertainment content. Across Televisa’s Latinx lineup, the Hoy YouTube channel boasts over 2.6 million subscribers, and its social media presence amplifies reach across film, music, and pop-culture verticals—making it the ideal vehicle for engaging mainstream and deeply engaged spec-ified audiences in both LATAM and the U.S. Hispanic market.

“Conversa com Bial” is a late-night talk show on Rede Globo and GNT hosted by veteran journalist Pedro Bial. Featuring in-depth interviews with cultural icons—from musicians and actors to thinkers and political figures—the show blends intelligent conversation with a subtle touch of entertainment. Its intimate format and high production standards have resonated strongly in Brazil, with audience demand reaching three times the level of the average TV series in the country  . On Instagram alone, @conversacombial has amassed over 922K followers  , while the show continues to command a dedicated fan base across TV and digital platforms, making it a powerful showcase for culturally relevant artist exposure in Brazil.

The Noite com Danilo Gentili is Brazil’s top late-night talk show on SBT, hosted by comedian Danilo Gentili with his signature irreverent humor and fast-paced interview format. Featuring celebrity guests, comedy sketches, and a house band (Ultraje a Rigor), the show consistently reaches millions nightly. Its YouTube channel boasts approximately 13 million subscribers, making it one of the most-watched talk shows globally on the platform

Fantástico is Rede Globo’s legendary weekly newsmagazine and Brazil’s most-watched Sunday program since its debut in 1973. Blending journalism, documentary, music, and entertainment with high production values, it’s a cultural institution that reaches nearly the entire Brazilian population through Globo’s network, which covers over 98% of the country. The show’s official Instagram account @showdavida has amassed over 4.4 million followers, and Parrot Analytics reports audience demand that consistently exceeds the average for Brazilian TV series. With its mix of in-depth storytelling and musical segments, Fantástico remains a premier platform for connecting artists with highly engaged, mainstream Brazilian audiences across TV and digital
